channel.title: 分辨率 on nonwill
channel.description: Recent content in 分辨率 on nonwill

item.title: VMWare中Manjaro永久修改分辨率
item.description: 1. 打开或创建xorg.conf： sudo nano /etc/X11/xorg.conf 2. 在文件中添加如下部分： Section "Monitor" Identifier "Configured Monitor" Modeline "1920x1080_60.00" 173.00 1920 2048 2248 2576 1080 1083 1088 1120 -hsync +vsync Option "PreferredMode" "1920x1080_60.00" EndSection Section "Screen" Identifier "Default Screen" Monitor "Configured Monitor" Device "Configured Video Device" EndSection Section "Device" Identifier "Configured Video Device" EndSection 3. 保存文件并重启系统
